title: SOME CONSIDERATIONS ON THE USE OF PERSONS WITH SPECIAL KNOWLEDGE IN COLLECTING EVIDENCE
author: Abduvahobov, Sherzodbek
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Officials who carry out the verification process must ensure the competence of a specialist before initiating investigative actions involving them, in accordance with Article 69 of the Criminal Procedure Code. However, we can see that the procedure for this procedural action is not specified in the law.
steps_raw: Officials who carry out the verification process must ensure the competence of a specialist before initiating investigative actions involving them, in accordance with Article 69 of the Criminal Procedure Code. However, we can see that the procedure for this procedural action is not specified in the law.
